topic: white wine lees ageing, texture, and complexity
trigger_keywords: crianza sobre lias en vinos blancos
uso de lias en vinos blancos

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A white wine remains in contact with fine lees after fermentation.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: As yeast cells break down, autolysis releases mannoproteins, polysaccharides, and flavour-active compounds into the wine.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine develops greater body, a creamier texture, and additional aromatic and flavour complexity.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine develops greater body, a creamier texture, and additional aromatic and flavour complexity.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
